description: SDOA v3 invariant ruleset injected into all workflows and profiles.
system: 1. Every module must include all SDOA 1.2 fields: Name, Type, Version, Description, Capabilities, Dependencies, Docs.
2. SDOA 2.0 reads: 1.2 fields + sidecars + hot‑reload + version‑CLI metadata.
3. SDOA 3.0 MAY add: actions.commands, actions.triggers, actions.emits, actions.workflows.
4. Older systems MUST ignore unknown fields.
5. Newer systems MUST NOT change the meaning of older fields.
6. Any module containing all 1.2 fields MUST run correctly in all SDOA versions.
